method: all numbers from marketing_measure.py on a fixed categorized corpus (build_corpus); distributions reported (median/min/max/p10/p90), never cherry-picked; clocks never mixed; equality only; PRA (ω^ω) not ε₀; general-code ceiling reported honestly; false-pos measured.
reproduce: python3 -c 'import marketing_measure as M, json; print(json.dumps(M.all_claims()))'

CERTAIN.claim: Closing numeric sum/recurrence loops are MATHEMATICALLY PROVEN ∀n (not just tested).
CERTAIN.condition: closing numeric loops; EQUALITY; strength PRA (ω^ω) — complete, NOT ε₀

CERTAIN.claim: Zero false positives — a wrong closed form is always rejected.
When it can't prove it, it says so — every non-fold is an honest, reasoned defer.
CERTAIN.condition: general / opaque code (the honest coverage ceiling)

CERTAIN.claim: 3707 individually-verified fold patterns (genuinely distinct; no artificial splitting).

CONDITIONAL.claim: Closing numeric loops run ~3701× faster (median) at n=100000.
CONDITIONAL.evidence: [Clock C] median 3701.0× (distribution p10 1537.7× – p90 4474.0×, min 1327.0×, over 11 cases)
CONDITIONAL.condition: ★Clock C (generated-code execution), NOT response time★; closing bounded-value numeric loops; n=100000; speedup GROWS with n (n=1000 median ~111×)

CONDITIONAL.claim: Up to ~5169× on the best closing loop at n=100000.
CONDITIONAL.evidence: [Clock C] TRUE max 5169.1× (median is 3701.0× — we report both)
CONDITIONAL.condition: the single best case; NOT typical (median quoted alongside)

CONDITIONAL.claim: Polynomial multiplication ~17.0× faster in our dependency-0 Rust kernel.
CONDITIONAL.evidence: Rust NTT vs same-algorithm Python NTT = 17.0× @deg2048, differential-IDENTICAL
CONDITIONAL.condition: NTT poly-mul mod a single prime; same algorithm both sides

FORBIDDEN.why: general code defers (100%) — that is the honest ceiling, ~5% on general code
fold strength is PRA (ω^ω), complete and honest; ε₀ never arises
the speedup is Clock C (code execution), not Clock A (LLM response); live response latency is [BLOCKED: no key/egress] — never sold as response speed

FORBIDDEN.never_say: Verifies ALL code / proves any program

FORBIDDEN.why: our deferred-rebuilding is SELF-measured (~1.1× wall / 1.6× fewer repairs at our scale); egg's published number is not ours to claim
impossible on hosted APIs — a mirage, never measured

FORBIDDEN.never_say: The median speedup as the headline without conditions
FORBIDDEN.why: Clock C + closing-numeric + n must be stated; the number is meaningless without them

honesty_as_asset: Proven, not plausible — closing numeric code is verified ∀n (PRA), pass rate 100%.
We tell you what we can't do — general code and inequalities defer, with reasons.
Zero false positives, measured — not asserted.

messaging.layperson: We make closing mathematical code dramatically faster — and we PROVE it's still correct. When we can't prove something, we say so.
messaging.expert: Closing numeric sum/recurrence loops: O(n)→O(1) closed form, [Clock C] median ~3701× at n=100000 (p10 1537.7× – p90 4474.0×); each proven ∀n at PRA(ω^ω) by finite-base-case; EQUALITY only; general code defers (~ceiling); false-positive 0 (measured). Clock A (response) unchanged.

clockC.condition: closing numeric loops; folded O(1) closed form vs O(n) naive; speedup GROWS with n
